summary: Correct three exact-head beta.2 hosted-CI failures: a stale production-static test inventory, a non-Windows Rust import, and an overbroad editor selector that counted the two read-only History comparison editors as document duplication.

decisions.decision: Assert the imported Playwright configuration's testMatch value structurally instead of matching an exact source-code string.
decisions.rationale: The shipped offline manufacturing-estimate journey was correctly added to the configuration, but the raw-source assertion still encoded the previous two-test spelling. Structural comparison checks behavior and fails when the configured inventory is actually wrong.

decisions.decision: Compile the std::process::Command import only on Windows, matching the Windows-only code that consumes it.
decisions.rationale: The exact Ubuntu Clippy gate correctly rejected the unconditional unused import; target-gating the import preserves behavior and makes the platform boundary explicit.

decisions.decision: Read source from the focused workbench editor group rather than concatenating every CodeMirror line mounted anywhere in the page.
decisions.rationale: The retained hosted trace proves one approval click and one real main.scad line. Opening History also mounts Current source and Snapshot source as two read-only CodeMirror panes, so the old global selector falsely reported the same source three times.

testEvidence.criterion: The production-static gate must verify the complete configured browser inventory without coupling to formatting.
testEvidence.test: Run the exact production-static browser contract test after importing and comparing the effective configuration.

red.outcome: RED: one stale exact-source-string assertion failed after AC-15.n legitimately added manufacturing-estimate-offline.e2e.ts; the remaining 1,691 tests passed and one was skipped.

green.outcome: GREEN: one test file and all 3 contract tests passed.

testEvidence.criterion: Desktop Rust must remain warning-free on non-Windows hosted targets.
testEvidence.test: Target-gate the Windows process launcher import and run formatting plus Clippy with warnings denied.

red.outcome: RED: Ubuntu Clippy rejected the unconditional std::process::Command import as unused.

green.command: cargo fmt --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check; cargo clippy --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
green.outcome: GREEN: formatting passed and desktop Clippy completed with warnings denied.

testEvidence.criterion: Hosted approval evidence must distinguish the editable document from read-only History comparisons.
testEvidence.test: Inspect the retained failing trace, scope editorSource to the focused workbench editor, and run the single hosted M4 journey once.

red.command: GitHub Actions run 29901901515 artifact m4-hosted-browser-evidence, trace from tests/e2e/m4-hosted-journey.e2e.ts
red.outcome: RED: the global .cm-line selector joined three CodeMirror instances. The retained trace showed exactly one AGENT_SOURCE in Current source, one in Snapshot source, and one in the actual main.scad editor after a single approval click; no document duplication occurred.

green.outcome: GREEN: the complete hosted M4 journey passed 1/1 in 13.9 seconds using the focused-editor selector.

testEvidence.criterion: The correction set must preserve TypeScript, source-policy, and Rust quality gates.
testEvidence.test: Run typecheck, lint/source policy, Rust formatting, and desktop Clippy once after the targeted corrections.

red.outcome: RED: the exact-head hosted run exposed the three failures recorded above; no blind rerun was used.

green.command: pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint; cargo fmt --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check; cargo clippy --manifest-path src/desktop-shell/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript, Biome over 613 files, source policy, Rust formatting, and warning-denied Clippy all passed.

questions: Q-0042 remains the only literal M6 specification contradiction and is unaffected by these hosted-CI corrections.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
